concerns: The change in handoff to BARCAN-TAG-08 (Database Engineer) requires early alignment with backend roles on the precise schema properties to support future API integrations.
A formal protocol specification (e.g., protobuf/OpenAPI) for the bridge API is not defined in this spike and should be a priority for the backend role.
The fail-closed socket policy for proxy isolation should be validated via automated integration/network-fault injection tests during implementation.
